/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libsleefdft.a CMakeFiles/dftcommon_obj.dir/dftcommon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dft_obj.dir/dft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_0_purecdp_obj.dir/unroll_0_purecdp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_2_purecdp_obj.dir/unroll_2_purecdp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_0_advsimddp_obj.dir/unroll_0_advsimddp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_2_advsimddp_obj.dir/unroll_2_advsimddp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_0_purecsp_obj.dir/unroll_0_purecsp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_2_purecsp_obj.dir/unroll_2_purecsp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_0_advsimdsp_obj.dir/unroll_0_advsimdsp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unroll_2_advsimdsp_obj.dir/unroll_2_advsimdsp.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libsleefdft.a
